svg.text: LUKS Encrypted Volume — ~/forensics/ (30GB) — Agent reads/writes directly
No NFS layer. No VM boundary. Evidence lives here.
Can see ~/forensics/ directly — no SSH schism
task handoff • finding exchange • cross-profile coordination
SIFT Workstation VM — VMware • 12GB RAM • 4 vCPU
Ubuntu 22.04 | SSH :2222 | sansforensics@sift | NFS mount: /cases/ ← host:~/forensics/
Docker Containers (on Host — not in VM)
⚠ Session canary validates on EVERY start — degraded = triage-only
HIGH — canary validated + cross-validated + known OS
MEDIUM — validated, single tool, known OS
LOW — canary passed, evidence OS unknown
DEGRADED — do not use for evidentiary work
1. SSH schism: Fixed — terminal.backend: local, Docker on host, SSH wrapper for native tools only
2. Memory OOM: volatility3 runs on host (all RAM), Docker --memory=16g flag for large dumps
3. VM lifecycle: Human starts SIFT VM before session. Canary checks connectivity.
4. Tool drift: NEVER 'sift update'. Canary checks native tool versions on every start.
